headline: Eaton completes acquisition of leading liquid-cooling solutions provider Boyd Thermal, creating an industry-leading grid-to-chip solution for data centers
summary: DUBLIN, March 12, 2026--Intelligent power management company Eaton (NYSE:ETN) today announced it has completed the acquisition of the Boyd Thermal business of Boyd Corporation from Goldman Sachs Asset Management. Boyd Thermal is a leader in thermal components, systems and ruggedized solutions for data centers, aerospace and other end markets.

headline: Lightning Round: Buy more Energy Transfer if it comes down, says Jim Cramer
summary: 'Mad Money' host Jim Cramer weighs in on stocks including: Energy Transfer, Eaton Corp., Nordic American Tankers, United States Antimony, and B&G Foods.

headline: Has Eaton (ETN) Run Too Far After A 132.8% Three Year Share Price Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether Eaton's current share price still offers value, or if most of the opportunity has already been priced in, this article will walk through what the numbers show. With the stock at US$355.79 after a 0.4% gain over the past week, a 5.6% decline over 30 days, an 8.7% return year to date, and a 23.3% return over 1 year, many investors are reassessing how much upside or downside might be left. Recent attention on Eaton has focused on how investors are thinking about its...

headline: Eaton: Solid Operating Results Meet Elevated Market Expectations
summary: Eaton (ETN) is a Buy, with a target price of $373, reflecting more conservative growth assumptions and a 7% upside from current levels.

headline: How The Eaton (ETN) Investment Story Is Evolving As Analyst Views Rebalance
summary: Eaton’s modeled fair value has shifted only slightly, moving from about $407.53 to roughly $408.45, which points to a very modest change in the implied upside in dollar terms. Around that value, you are seeing price targets move both higher and lower as analysts react to Q4 work, reset views toward the mid $300s, or, in some cases, lift targets by $8 to $20 alongside a rating upgrade. As you read on, you will see how to make sense of these cross currents and keep up with the evolving Eaton...
